name: Spanish Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken, lettuce, and onion in a bowl.
2. Thoroughly combine olive oil and red wine vinegar in a separate small bowl.
3. Season the dressing to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently.
5. Arrange the chicken on top of the lettuce leaves.
6. Garnish with orange slices, avocado slices, and radish slices.
